title: Customer Project Coordinator - Product Management
matched_skills: Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (maps to coordinating with sales, logistics, production teams)
Report generation / data storytelling (maps to generating statistics and reports for sales management)
Budget tracking (partial match to forecast preparation support)
missing_skills: CRM system maintenance (e.g., Salesforce, SAP CRM)
Sales support and marketing campaign support
Vocational/commercial training background (office management, industrial clerk)
key_requirements: Process customer inquiries and incoming orders
Carry out price checks and prepare quotations and order confirmations
Maintain and update customer data in CRM system
Coordinate with field sales, logistics, and production teams
Generate statistics and reports for sales management
Support sales projects and marketing campaigns
cv_highlights: Cross-functional stakeholder coordination at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
KPI tracking and reporting (Power BI certified)
Multilingual: English, German, Chinese, Cantonese — useful for international customer communications
gaps: Role is fundamentally a customer service / sales order management position — not PMO or project management
No CRM system experience mentioned in CV
No order processing, pricing, or quotation background
Significant overqualification: Boru has 4+ years international PMO/coordination experience vs. entry-level vocational requirement
Location gap: ~500km from Lüneburg to Kelkheim — relocation or long commute required
'Product Management' in title is misleading; actual work is customer support and order administration
recommended_emphasis: If applying: emphasize CRM-adjacent documentation skills and stakeholder communication
Highlight multilingual capabilities for customer-facing communications
Downplay PMO and governance framing; reframe as coordination and support experience
recommendation: Not recommended. This is a customer service / sales support / order processing role requiring vocational-level qualifications. It does not align with Boru's PMO and project coordination background, offers no career progression in the target direction, and the ~500km distance adds a significant practical barrier. Match score 18/100.
